name: copilot-second-opinion
description: OpenCode plugin + MCP server + skill that runs an automated GitHub Copilot PR review loop: request review, wait deterministically via `gh run watch`, triage every comment, push fixes, reply, resolve, gated merge. Solves the silent-fail of github_request_copilot_review and the no-gating footgun of github_merge_pull_request.

scripts.check: node -e "import('./plugin/index.js').then(m => { if (!m.CopilotReviewPlugin && !m.default) throw new Error('plugin entry missing'); console.log('plugin import ok'); })"

author: Adam Hassan
